caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with gold lettering that reads "BOSS TALK" sits at a desk in a studio. He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm and is looking toward someone off-camera to his left, speaking and gesturing slightly with his hand near his face. In the background, a white wall features a repeating logo that includes five gold stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE," while a blue banner above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right on the desk sits a black container with red and white text that says "BOSS TALK OUT". A small logo in the lower-left corner also reads "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, continuing his conversation with subtle changes in his facial expression and head tilt.
